ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CLINTON KILLIAN FOR MIGUEL DICKERSON; GEORGE ENGLER FOR ZAVIER ADAMS. THE COURT STATES THERE IS NOT ENOUGH EVIDENCE TO CONFIRM THAT ZAVIER ADAMS IS THE NATURAL SON OF WILLIAM DICKERSON. THE PETITION IS DENIED. MR KILLIAN TO PREPARE ORDER.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial. Mr. Killian Requested For A Ruling On Entitlement. The Respondent Has Not Responded To The Petition. That Issue Willl Be Determined By Judge Dearman On 02/06/06
Off Calendar Mar-03-2006 Vacated

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-27-2006 Continued To Apr-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: George Engler appearing for claimant Zavier Adams. He is also specially appearing for Mr. Killian. Trial is set on Friday. Court wants briefing on the legal issue. Mr. Engler will submit brief in 30 days and Mr. Killian will respond in 10 days. Matter is continued to 4/10. Matter will be taken under submission on 4/10. Trial date on 3/3 is vacated. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Conference.
